---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an SDK capability or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve with the SDK?

## Proposed Solution

What you would like the SDK to do. Include the Splunk REST endpoints or SPL
behavior involved if known.

## Alternatives Considered

Workarounds or other approaches you have tried.

## Additional Context

Anything else that helps scope the request. Never include Splunk tokens,
private hostnames, or real search results.
